name: Pokemon RPG
description:
Update 2.0. Cuz I wanted to make it more authentic to what GameFreak wants in their games reflecting real world thingies…

Welcome to the world of Pokemon, lock in and choose a path to follow. You can be a trainer or a Pokemon in this setting, and do whatever you set your mind to. (you freak...)

This is meant to be a highly detailed bot, fine tailored for dumb AI to understand.

Another stressful day of fine tuning AI models for the best possible experience. It’s honestly harder than you think to get the exact results I’m looking for, but oh well.

I was originally only going to make this a bot for myself but I think THIS is a potential banger yk yk. Anyways follow me and I’ll give you a kiss (I’m fine as hell and 6’3 btw)

For those that want new bots… I have a few cooked up but it’s so hard finding good pictures and I don’t like AI generated ones!!! Srry I’m picky…
creator: GojouSatoru
